paths.title: Beading Starter
paths.tagline: Low barrier, quick mastery, affordable entry
paths.description: Perfect for those who want to start simple and see results fast. You'll learn to assemble beads into earrings, bracelets, and simple necklaces.
paths.target_user: Women 25-45 who want a relaxing hobby without investing heavily right away.
paths.result_type: A pair of earrings you can wear right away
paths.why_this_path: You chose a low budget, want quick mastery, and hobby is your goal. That's exactly where beading shines.

paths.title: Wire Wrapping Starter
paths.description: For those who want more of a crafts feel. You learn to wrap wire around stones and beads to create unique jewelry with character.
paths.target_user: Creative people who like working with their hands and want to create something that feels personal and real.
paths.result_type: A bracelet with a unique stone you wrapped yourself
paths.why_this_path: You want more crafts feel, have a medium budget and a bit more time. Wire wrapping delivers that feeling.

paths.title: Silver-Curious Starter
paths.tagline: For those who want to move toward silver and metal — without going all in
paths.description: For those who have a romantic picture of 'real craftsmanship' and want to try silver and metal, but aren't ready for an expensive course or complicated equipment.
paths.target_user: Those who envision a long-term jewelry journey and want to explore whether it's right for them.
paths.result_type: A stamped silver ring you can wear every day
paths.why_this_path: You're ready for a real investment and a proper first project. Silver is the way.
